build.buildCommand: npm install && npm run build && mkdir -p /usr/local/bin && curl --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -fL -A SkyeBot/yt-dlp-installer https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp --version && echo 'Build complete: yt-dlp installed at /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp'
